summary: Iteration 23: Visual bug fixes verified - PASS. All yellow buttons changed to blue (#0A84FF), broken Tailwind CSS patterns (bg-[var(--color-xxx)]/YY) replaced with rgba() values, no thick white borders on stat cards/badges.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Visual bug fixes verified. All buttons use bg-[var(--color-accent)] (blue #0A84FF), not bg-[var(--color-warning)] (yellow). All broken Tailwind patterns replaced with rgba() values. Stat cards use .tf-stat class for consistent styling.

bugs_tested: Thick white borders on stat cards removed

dashboard.notes: KPI cards load correctly without overflow or thick borders

coaches_page.stat_cards: No thick white borders - using .tf-stat class

challenge_page.notes: Nouveau Challenge button is blue, badges have subtle styling

transactions_page.badge_fix: Using rgba() with border-0, no white outlines

onboarding_page.stat_cards: No thick white borders - subtle colored borders per status

members_page.duo_badge: Not visible in test data, but other badges look correct

compare_page.best_worst_cards: Subtle colored borders (green/red), no thick white borders

settings_page.notes: KPI targets visible, all inputs styled correctly

courses_page.info_banner: Subtle blue styling, no thick borders

yellow_buttons_removed.check: grep for bg-[var(--color-warning)] in pages returned empty

broken_tailwind_patterns.notes: All opacity patterns replaced with rgba() values

badge_border_fix.check: TransactionsPage uses rgba() and border-0 for badges
badge_border_fix.notes: No white border outlines on badges
